request: Plan a finance/compliance review path for new role-corpus imports so no external role content becomes trusted without curation.

docket.objective: Create a governed planning path for importing and curating external role material.
docket.whyNow: External role corpora are useful, but trust, spend, and policy implications need a formal review path.
constraints: No live execution from imported roles
Reference-only sources stay reference-only until promoted
knownFacts: Internal curated manifests are allowed runtime seats
External corpora are only source material in v1
unknowns: Whether future paid source feeds will change procurement requirements

assumptions.statement: A pinned-snapshot strategy is adequate for v1 governance.
